agentGenerate.beautifyDisabled: Enable 小花美术 in the main agent's tool settings first.
agentGenerate.defaultModelMissing: Configure a default image model in settings first.
agentGenerate.defaultModelInvalid: The default image model is unavailable. Reconfigure it in settings.
agentGenerate.imageGenUnavailable: The image generation tool is disabled. Enable it in settings first.
agentGenerate.agentUnavailable: The main agent is temporarily unavailable, so Agent generation can't start.
agentGenerate.label: Agent generate

quickChat.title: Quick Chat
quickChat.serviceUnavailable: Could not connect to Hana service

channel.selectHint: Select a channel or DM to start
channel.readOnly: 🔒 This is a private message between agents, view only
channel.createIntroPlaceholder: Describe what this channel is for...
channel.deleteConfirm: Delete channel "{name}"? Message history cannot be recovered.
channel.warningBody:
I believe letting assistants with different memories and thinking styles interact can spark more inspiration, so I built a place where agents can talk to each other, even when you're away.

Please note that channels are experimental and may cause:
1. Higher token usage
2. Unexpected responses
3. Memory confusion

Use with caution
channel.replyRangeInvalid: Minimum length cannot exceed maximum length
channel.filesUnsupported: Channels currently support text only; files will not be attached to chat

projects.title: Projects
projects.deleteProjectConfirm: Delete project "{name}"? Its chats will move to Uncategorized.
projects.deleteFolderConfirm: Delete folder "{name}"? Its projects will move to the project root.

deletedAgent.title: Agent deleted
deletedAgent.description: This chat is kept as read-only history. Continuing will create a new session on your primary Agent after compacting the old context.

archived.title: Archived Chats
archived.cleanupConfirm: Permanently delete {count} archives ({size} total)? This cannot be undone.
archived.restoreConfirm: Restore this conversation to its original location?
archived.restoreConflict: Original location is occupied; cannot restore
archived.deleteConfirm: Permanently delete this archive? This cannot be undone.

session.subagentRunStateUnrecoverable: Historical sub-session run state is unrecoverable

common.screenshotSaved: Screenshot saved under "OH-Works" in your working directory
common.screenshotSavedMultiple: Saved {count} screenshot segments under "OH-Works" in your working directory

input.accessModeLocked: Access mode cannot be changed right now
input.textModelImageBlocked: The current model is text-only and cannot send images directly. Adjust the model capability in settings, or configure and enable auxiliary vision.
input.textModelVideoBlocked: The current model does not support video input. Enable video capability in settings, or switch to a video-capable model.
input.textModelAudioBlocked: The current model does not support audio input. Switch to an audio-capable model.
input.imageReadFailed: Could not read the image, so the message was not sent. Paste or attach it again.
input.videoReadFailed: Could not read the video, so the message was not sent. Attach it again.
input.audioReadFailed: Could not read the audio, so the message was not sent. Attach it again.
input.audioRecordingUnavailable: Microphone recording is unavailable in this environment.
input.audioRecordingFailed: Recording failed. Check microphone permission and try again.

messages: What do you need? Leave it to {name}
Just say whatever comes to mind.
welcome.memoryOff: Memory not used for this chat
placeholderTips: Type / to bring up the command menu
Use @ to reference files in your workspace
Drop a file into the input to send it along
Paste an image to send it directly
Select any text on the page — a floating input will appear
The diamond button below the avatar toggles memory for this chat
The workspace button lets you switch or add folders
The right panel holds notes and context for this chat
Tap the small dots under the avatar to switch assistants
Ask-before-acting mode makes the assistant confirm before doing things
Try /rc to control your computer from your phone
Enable Vision Assist in settings — text models can understand images too
Looking for something new? Check out the plugin marketplace
File backup helps if you're worried about losing data
Use subagents for Agent collaboration at work; channels are for play
Each Agent can be configured with its own Skills
Try sunbathing in Sunny mode!
Markdown files in the workspace can be edited directly when opened
After spending some time with your assistant, try the diary feature!
Diaries and screenshots are saved in the main assistant's workspace
Each assistant can have its own workspace; with Patrol on, they'll act on their own there

butter: {name} flipped to a page left unfinished yesterday
Some words haven't been said yet, {name} remembers
{name} is napping
They're piecing together memories too precious to forget
{name} carefully tucked away your last mood
A sentence has been sitting on the tip of the tongue for a while
When they woke up, they first wondered what you were doing
There are unfinished stories hidden in those ellipses
{name} is folding what they want to say into tiny tiny notes
Today's clouds look just like the photo you took that day
ming: {name} drew a reference line in the margin of the draft paper
Old questions are settling, new ideas are emerging
They reviewed yesterday's clues once more
{name} thinks the derivation of that formula was beautiful
{name} is thinking about how to optimize work
{name} is trying to keep everything in order
They verified last time's conclusion again
{name} thinks your reasoning that day was sharp
{name} organized their thoughts while waiting for the coffee to cool

butter: Hey there~
You came to find me?
How's your day going?
{name} has been here waiting for you
{name} was just thinking of saying something to you
Gently sorting through what you said
Slowly unfolding your feelings
Looking for the softest way to say it
Words are lining up inside
Folding their thoughts neatly
Quietly reflecting
Searching through memories for something
Crafting a hug-sized reply
Some feelings need time to untangle
Making a soft space for your words

toolGroup.success: ✿ {name} all done, piece of cake ~ · {n} steps

edit.failed: ✏️ {name} made a bit of a mess

edit-diff.failed: ✏️ {name} made a bit of a mess

channel.heading: # Channels
channel.ambiguousName: Channel name "{name}" is not unique. Please use a channel ID instead: {choices}

recall_experience.running: 🧠 {name} is flipping through the experience notes

get-cover-style-guide.running: 📖 {name} is looking up the style guide

checkDeferred.noTasks: No background tasks in current conversation{qualifier}.

workflow.dispatched: Workflow "{summary}" has been dispatched for background execution (task {taskId}). Results will automatically return to the conversation when complete.
workflow.resumeFromRunIdDesc: runId (taskId) of a previous workflow, used for checkpoint resume: completed agent nodes whose prompt+opts are unchanged return cached results instantly, re-execution starts from the first changed position.

adaptation.compacted: Conversation history compacted for new model
adaptation.truncated: Earlier conversation truncated for new model

lines: Some words sprouted in their memory
They found your silhouette in memories
Those words soaked in time, turning soft
A memory was dog-eared by you
splash.installing: {name} is updating to v{version}, please wait…

settings.title: Settings
settings.fileChangedOnDisk: The file changed on disk, so the stale save was skipped

browser.acceptCookiesHint: When enabled, the in-app browser saves and sends website Cookies like a normal browser.
browser.clearCookiesHint: Clear Cookies and site data saved by the in-app browser.
browser.agentOpenBehaviorHint: Choose whether the agent reuses the current tab or opens a new tab by default.

experiments.title: Experiments
experiments.compactionSectionDescription: Choose whether compact prioritizes prompt-cache preservation or broad history compatibility.
experiments.modelPersonaDescription: Observe how providers adapt to Hana's persona, mood, and output contracts.
experiments.description: Forward-looking features land here first. Once stable, they move to the settings page where they belong.

cacheSnapshot.title: Cache Memory System
cacheSnapshot.description: Build memory with cached context to improve cache hit rate and reduce spend.
cacheSnapshot.observeOnly: Observe only, do not write memory
cacheSnapshot.observationNote: Observation mode has no effect on formal memory. It only shows whether the new memory system behaves as expected.
cacheSnapshot.writeWarning: This mode writes to formal memory.

compaction.title: Compaction mode
compaction.description: Auto prefers cache-preserving compaction. Normal compaction lets Pi SDK run its native summarizer, which is better for unstable history formats.

deepseekRoleplay.title: DeepSeek persona immersion patch
deepseekRoleplay.description: When enabled, new DeepSeek V4 thinking sessions temporarily append a persona-immersion marker to the first outbound user message. It is not displayed, saved, or restored in chat history. Turning it off keeps the old behavior.

proactiveSubagent.title: Proactive subagent delegation
proactiveSubagent.description: When enabled, the agent proactively delegates broad exploration and research tasks to subagents, conserving the main chat's context attention. May yield better results for complex tasks.

experiments.subagentSectionDescription: Control how the agent decides when to delegate work to subagents.

appearance.title: Appearance
appearance.fontHint: Choose the font used for body reading.
appearance.serifFontHint: Use serif font for body text
appearance.paperTextureHint: Add a rice paper texture to the background
appearance.paperTextureDarkDisabledHint: Paper texture is unavailable in night themes and will return with your saved setting in light themes

interface.hardwareAccelerationHint: Use the GPU to render app windows. Turning this off takes effect on next launch and uses software rendering for Windows GPU-driver startup recovery.
interface.voiceRecordingShortcutHint: When the main chat page is focused, press once to start recording, then press again to finish and send.

editor.title: Editor
editor.markdownFontHint: Follow the appearance reading font by default, or choose one just for the editor.
editor.markdownLineHeightHint: Controls vertical rhythm inside the editor.
editor.markdownContentPaddingHint: Controls left and right padding for editor content.

locale.title: Language & Region
locale.timezoneHint: Used for memory timestamps, journal entries, etc.

computerUse.title: Computer Use
computerUse.experimentalWarning: Computer use is experimental and requires strong model performance. Enable it only after understanding the risks. Some apps are already known not to behave as expected; treat it as an early preview.
computerUse.description: A global high-permission tool. When enabled, only the main agent can use computer control in Operate sessions, and only one session can hold it at a time.
computerUse.enabledHint: Off by default. When off, new sessions do not expose the computer control tool.
computerUse.permissionsHint: macOS requests Accessibility and Screen Recording permissions. Windows usually needs no extra OS permission.
computerUse.permissionsEmpty: No extra permissions or no status yet

agent.title: Agent
agent.identityHint: A short description of who this agent is and what they're good at. Other agents use this to know them
agent.ishikiHint: Defines the assistant's character, tone and behavior. Separate from Yuan and does not affect it.
agent.publicIshikiHint:
For privacy, the assistant cannot access memories, your personal info, or any files and tools on your computer when talking to visitors.
You can set the assistant's reply style and guidelines for visitor conversations here.
agent.chatModelHint: The model used for conversations and tasks
agent.modelUnavailableHint: The current model is no longer available. Select another model, or save the provider config again and fetch models.
agent.imageModelHint: The model used for image generation
agent.deleteDesc1: This will permanently delete all config, memory and conversations. This cannot be undone.
agent.lastAgent: Must keep at least one agent
agent.yuanHint: "Yuan" is the agent's subconscious. Build your unique companion from this foundation.

tools.title: Tools
tools.description: Tool switches take effect after restarting or starting a conversation. Active conversations keep using the tool set they started with.

automation.label: Automation
automation.summary: Let the agent create scheduled notifications and plugin actions

beautify.label: 小花美术
beautify.summary: Let the agent generate document covers and aesthetic enhancements

browser.label: Browser
browser.summary: Control a headless browser to navigate web pages

cron.label: Scheduled Tasks
cron.summary: Run tasks automatically at specified times

dm.label: Direct Message
dm.summary: Send a one-on-one message to another agent

install_skill.label: Install Skill
install_skill.summary: Install new skills from GitHub or the skill library

office.label: Office
office.summary: Let the agent read documents and convert HTML to PDF

update_settings.label: Update Settings
update_settings.summary: Allow the agent to modify application configuration

workflow.label: Workflow
workflow.summary: Let the agent orchestrate multi-agent workflow scripts as background tasks

xingye_propose_draft.label: Xingye Draft Proposer
xingye_propose_draft.summary: Heartbeat patrol drafts pending entries for the in-character phone / secret space (currently supports: journal; more modules to follow). Turning this off only stops new drafts; existing pending drafts are unaffected.

quickChat.title: Quick Chat
quickChat.shortcutHint: Click and press a new key combo. Esc cancels recording.
quickChat.reuseTimeoutHint: After the mini window stays hidden this long, the shortcut opens a fresh input.

notifications.title: Notifications
notifications.turnCompletionWhenSessionUnfocused: When not focused on the completed Session

about.title: About Them
about.tagline: An assistant that lives in your computer, with a good memory.
about.updateInstalling: Installing update. HanaAgent will restart automatically…
about.updateInstallManualHint: Install after clicking Restart to update; quitting will not install automatically
about.updateNeedInstall: Please move HanaAgent to the Applications folder first
about.updateDiskSpace: Not enough disk space to download update

access.lanHint: Allow phones and computers on the same LAN to reach this HanaAgent Server
access.portHint: Used by bookmarks and QR codes. Restart Hana after changing it
access.mobileUrlLanHint: Open this address in the phone browser
access.mobileUrlLocalHint: Only this computer can connect until LAN access is enabled
access.statusHint: Confirms where the server is listening and which mobile URL is currently effective
access.restartRequired: Port change saved. Restart Hana to apply it
access.mobileKeyHint: Use this for first login on mobile. The browser session takes over afterwards
access.mobileKeyOnce: The key is shown only once after creation
access.desktopUrlLanHint: Open this address in another computer's browser
access.desktopUrlLocalHint: Only this computer can connect until LAN access is enabled
access.desktopKeyHint: Use this for the first browser login on another computer
access.desktopKeyOnce: The key is shown only once after creation
access.remoteServerUrlHint: Enter the HanaAgent Server URL on another computer or NAS
access.remoteServerKeyHint: Enter the computer access key generated on that server
access.remoteConnectionDesc: Local account, password, LAN switches, and access keys in Access & Devices belong only to the local Hana instance.
access.remoteLocalOnlyNote: Switch back to local Hana before managing this computer's LAN access, device keys, or local account.
access.localConnectionUnavailable: Local Hana connection is not ready
access.passwordHint: For future secure remote login. LAN HTTP still prefers mobile access keys

security.sandboxDesc: Restrict filesystem writes; ordinary external files are read-only, and workspace files remain readable and writable
security.sandboxWarning: Disabling the sandbox allows the AI to read, write, or delete any file on the system, which may have unexpected consequences
security.sandboxNetworkDesc: Allow sandboxed commands to reach the public internet while keeping filesystem write limits active
security.sandboxNetworkDisabledDesc: When the sandbox is off, commands already run as normal local processes; this only affects sandboxed commands
security.sandboxNetworkWin32Unsupported: The Windows command sandbox isolates file writes only and does not support network isolation; commands keep the current user's network access
security.networkProxyModeDesc: In-app APIs, OAuth, Bridge, and web requests use this outbound proxy
security.networkProxyManualDesc: Supports http, https, socks, and socks5 URLs. HTTPS reuses HTTP when left empty
security.archivedChatsDesc: Review archived chats, restore conversations you need again, or permanently delete records you no longer want
security.fileBackupDesc: Automatically save original file content before AI modifications or deletions

me.title: Me
me.userProfileHint: Help the assistant know you: interests, habits, preferences. Injected into the system prompt

crop.title: Adjust avatar
crop.hint: Drag to move, scroll to zoom

providers.title: Registered Providers
providers.name: Provider
providers.setupHint: Enter API Key to activate this provider
providers.configInvalid: This provider config is damaged and has been skipped temporarily. Save the config again, or delete and recreate it.
providers.configIncomplete: This provider config is incomplete. Fill API Key, Base URL, and add or fetch models.
providers.selectHint: Select a provider to view details
providers.deleteConfirm: Delete provider {name}? Associated models will be removed.

usage.title: Usage
usage.note: Usage is for reference only. Final totals are determined by the provider.

media.credentialMissing: Not configured, go to Provider settings

oauth.title: Quick Login
oauth.deviceHint: Enter this code in the browser to authorize

api.title: Models & API
api.apiKeyPlaceholder: Enter a new key to update
api.utilityApiHint: If configured separately, provider, Base URL, and API key must all be explicit
api.mainModelHint: These models will be available in the chat page
api.utilityModelHint: Titles, light classification, etc. A cheap small model is recommended
api.utilityLargeModelHint: Activity summaries, task breakdown, etc. Falls back to small utility if empty
api.visionModelHint: Used only when the current chat model cannot accept images
api.visionModelMissingHint: Can't find your model? Enable its vision capability in the Providers page.
api.searchApiKeyHint: Enter the API key for the selected search provider
api.searchApiKeysAutoHint: Auto uses configured Tavily, Brave, and Serper keys first, then AnySearch free search, then browser search when quota, errors, empty results, or weak relevance get in the way.
api.searchApiKeyNotRequired: Browser search does not need an API key. It opens the search page locally in the background and structures the results.
api.thinkingLevelHint: Controls reasoning depth, only affects models that support reasoning

memory.title: Memory System
memory.needsUtilityModel: Configure a Utility model in Models tab first
memory.compiledHint: What the assistant remembers about you — important and recent things
memory.hitBonusHint: Score added each time a memory is referenced
memory.baseImportanceHint: Default initial score for new memories
memory.compileThresholdHint: Memories below this score are excluded

actions.title: Memory Management
actions.clearConfirm: Are you sure you want to clear all memories? This cannot be undone.
actions.activeOnly: Set this agent as active first

threshold.title: Memory Waterline
threshold.hint: You decide how many memories are remembered. A little noise is fine — LLMs are good at filtering.

memory.activeOnly: Set this agent as active first

pins.title: Pinned Memories
pins.hint: Always injected into conversations, never decay

experience.title: Experience
experience.hint: Lessons the agent has learned, organized by category. The agent checks relevant experience before starting work
experience.toggleHint: Off by default. When enabled, the assistant automatically summarizes work lessons and keeps growing, but this can pollute context.
experience.paused: Experience is paused. Existing entries are kept, but the assistant cannot read or record them.

search.noProvider: Please select a search engine first
search.noKey: Please enter an API Key first

work.title: Patrol
work.heartbeatMasterDesc: When off, all agent heartbeats are paused
work.heartbeatDesc: How often the assistant auto-checks the workspace
work.automationPermissionModeDesc: Controls whether background automation Agent runs auto-review tool calls, run with full access, or stay read-only
work.homeFolderDesc: Default working directory for new chats, patrol and cron tasks
work.socialGlobalThresholdDesc: After this many chat turns since last messaging another assistant, patrol gently nudges it to socialize (a hint, never forced). Higher = less often
work.socialPerPeerThresholdDesc: After this many chat turns without contacting a specific assistant, they're flagged as out of touch so nobody is forgotten
work.contextFilesDesc: Inject AGENTS.md / CLAUDE.md from the current workspace project into new session system prompts before memory.
work.injectAgentsMdDesc: When enabled, new sessions read AGENTS.md from the current working directory up to the Git root.
work.injectClaudeMdDesc: When enabled, new sessions read CLAUDE.md from the current working directory up to the Git root.

skills.title: Skills
skills.desc: Enable or disable skills for this agent. When enabled, the agent will automatically recognize and use matching skills in conversations.
skills.dropzone: Drop a skill folder to install, or click to browse
skills.learnHint: Try asking your assistant: find me some safe and useful skills from GitHub
skills.compatDesc: Auto-discover skills installed by other AI tools
skills.learnCreateDesc: Allow the Agent to write new skills or install them into the shared skill pool, enabled only for the current Agent by default
skills.fetchRemoteDesc: When enabled, the Agent will proactively search and install suitable skills for specialized tasks. Use with caution
skills.safetyReviewDesc: Use AI to detect prompt injection and other security risks before installing skills

fetchWarning.title: About fetching remote skills
fetchWarning.body1: When enabled, the Agent will proactively search, download and install suitable skills from GitHub and ClawHub during specialized tasks.
fetchWarning.body2: Although automatic safety review and star-count checks are performed before installation, the following risks remain:
fetchWarning.risk1: Skill content is not manually reviewed and may contain harmful instructions
fetchWarning.risk2: The Agent may install skills that don't match expectations
fetchWarning.risk3: Malicious skills may attempt to manipulate Agent behavior

safetyWarning.title: Disable safety review
safetyWarning.body1: Safety review detects potentially malicious content before installing skills, including:
safetyWarning.risk3: Social engineering and privilege escalation attempts
safetyWarning.body2: After disabling, all skills will be installed without review.
safetyWarning.confirm: I understand the risks, disable review

bundleDialog.dissolveConfirm: The skills in {name} will be kept in the shared library and shown as loose skills.

skills.removeFromBundleTitle: Remove from bundle, make loose skill

plugins.title: Plugins
plugins.fullAccessDesc: When enabled, plugins that declare full-access can use system-level APIs (routes, hooks, providers, etc.)
plugins.devToolsDesc: When enabled, the Agent can install, reload, enable, disable, and uninstall development plugins. This only affects the development plugin directory, not normally installed plugins.
plugins.dropzone: Drag plugin folder or .zip here to install, or click to select
plugins.deleteConfirm: Remove plugin "{name}"? Plugin data will be preserved.
plugins.needsFullAccess: Enable "Allow full-access plugins" to use this plugin
plugins.sensitiveHint: Stored value is hidden. Enter a new value to replace it.
plugins.marketplaceHint: Browse installable plugins, README files, permissions, and contribution types.
plugins.marketDowngradeTo: Only compatible version v{version} can be installed
plugins.marketDowngradeConfirm: Installed version is v{from}. Downgrade to v{to}?
plugins.marketSelectPlugin: Select a plugin to view its README

mcp.masterDesc: When off, new sessions receive no MCP connector tools. Frozen sessions keep their snapshot, but calls return an explicit error.
mcp.descriptionPlaceholder: Optional note for what this connector does
mcp.headersHint: One KEY=value pair per line. Values are stored for connector requests and masked after saving.
mcp.envHint: One KEY=value pair per line. Values are passed only to local stdio MCP server processes.
mcp.importJsonHint: Supports Cherry Studio, Claude, and other mcpServers JSON config shapes.
mcp.removeConfirm: Remove this connector? Saved per-agent switches will remain but no longer take effect.
mcp.agentConnectorDesc: Enable for the selected agent, just like skills.

screenshot.title: Screenshot Sharing
screenshot.desc: Choose the style and layout for sharing conversation screenshots
screenshot.fontHint: When no screenshot font is selected, screenshots follow the appearance reading font.
screenshot.mobileDesc: Tall image, ideal for phone sharing
screenshot.segmentLimitHint: When visible text exceeds this limit, the next screenshot starts at a full conversation-round boundary. Default is 10000 characters.

bridge.feishuHint: Get from Feishu Open Platform; events use long connection, no local callback URL needed
bridge.qqHint: Get from QQ Bot Open Platform (q.qq.com/qqbot)
bridge.wechatExclusive: Each WeChat account can only be bound to one Agent. Binding a new Agent will invalidate the previous one.
bridge.wechatReplyWindowReminder: Proactive WeChat notifications require a recent incoming message or reply window. If reminders do not arrive, send this Agent a WeChat message to activate that window.
bridge.wechatScanning: Scan the QR code with WeChat
bridge.wechatScanned: Scanned, please confirm on your phone
bridge.noCredentials: Please enter App ID and App Secret first
bridge.permissionModeDesc: Controls whether Bridge bots auto-review tool calls, run with full access, or stay read-only
bridge.receiptEnabledDesc: Send a short "received and replying" notice before the actual response
bridge.readOnlyDesc: Bridge bots can only read files, no writing or command execution
tutorialTgSteps: Search for @BotFather in Telegram and open the chat
Send /newbot and follow the prompts to set a name and username
BotFather will reply with a Bot Token (like 123456:ABC-DEF...)
Paste the Token into the input field above and turn on the switch
Find your Bot in Telegram and send a message to test it
bridge.ownerWarning: Warning: The selected account will have access to your computer, memory, and private information. Make sure the account belongs to you.
bridge.ownerNone: Send a message first to select
bridge.ownerConfirmText: The Owner has full Agent access, including memory, tools, and personality. Make sure this is your own account.
tutorialFsSteps: Go to open.feishu.cn, log in and open the Developer Console
Click "Create Enterprise Custom App", fill in the app name and description
On the "Credentials & Basic Info" page, copy the App ID and App Secret
Find "Add App Capabilities" in the left menu, add "Bot" capability and give it a name
Go to "Permissions", search and enable im:message (send and receive messages)
Go to "Events & Callbacks" → "Event Configuration", change to "Receive events via long connection"
Important: Go to "Version Management", create and publish a version first (long connection config requires a published app)
Paste the App ID and App Secret into the input fields above and turn on the switch

characterCard.noDescription: This character card has no description.
characterCard.dropOrClick: Drop a character card or click to open

welcome.title: Hi, I'm {name} ✿
welcome.subtitle:
I'm your personal AI assistant.
Let's do some quick setup to get started.

remote.link: Already have a server? Connect over LAN
remote.failed: Failed to connect to LAN server

name.title: Names and Memory
name.subtitle: Tell me what to call you, and give this Agent a name.
name.agentLabel: What should this Agent be called?
name.memoryHint: When enabled, the system reviews chats after they end and turns them into memory. Because memory updates often, model cache hit rates may be lower. Turning memory off is usually cheaper.

provider.title: Choose an AI Provider
provider.subtitle:
I need an AI model provider to work.
Pick your provider and enter your API Key.

model.title: Choose a Chat Model
model.subtitle: This is the main model I'll use. Pick a smart, capable one.
model.utilityHint: Summaries, fact extraction — pick a fast, cheap model
model.utilityLargeHint: Memory compilation, deep analysis — pick a capable model

theme.title: Pick a Theme
theme.subtitle: You can always change it later in Settings

workspace.title: Create a Workspace
workspace.subtitle:
The default workspace will be OH-WorkSpace on your Desktop.
You can choose another existing folder.
workspace.defaultHint:
If you do not choose another folder, this directory will be created automatically.
Patrol is off by default and can be enabled later in settings.

memory.title: Memory
memory.desc: I remember key points from your conversations. Older, less-referenced memories fade naturally, just like ours.

skills.title: Skills
skills.desc: I can read/write files, run commands, and search the web. Manage more skills in Settings.

workspace.title: Workspace
workspace.desc: Set a folder as your workspace and I can help manage your projects and files.

jian.title: Jian
jian.desc:
Drop a jian.md in any folder with your instructions.
I'll pick it up during patrol and execute automatically.

agents.title: Multi-Agent Collaboration
agents.desc:
Different agents can take on separate tasks and hand work off.
Useful for breaking down complex work.

activity.title: Activity
activity.empty: No activity yet. Patrol runs and scheduled tasks will appear here.
activity.emptyForCategory: No activity in this category yet.
activity.sessionLoadFailed: This background session cannot be loaded right now.
activity.noSessionMessages: No messages to show for this background session.

automation.title: Scheduled Tasks

No scheduled tasks yet.
The assistant will create them when needed.
automation.emptyForAgent: No scheduled tasks for this Agent yet.
automation.promptPlaceholder: Write what you want {agent} to do
automation.promptRequired: Write what the Agent should do before enabling this automation.

desk.cwdSkillsDrop: Drop folder or .zip to install skills
desk.jianPlaceholder: Write something to tell the assistant how to handle files in this folder...

The desk is the assistant's patrol workspace and the default directory for every chat.
Set a folder in settings.

desk.trashFailed: Failed to move item to the system Trash
desk.renameInvalid: File names cannot contain path separators

browser.backgroundHint: Background browser running, click to view

dialog.serverFilesNotReady: Auto-update just completed; new version files still landing on disk (missing {missing}). Waited {waited}s without success. Please restart HanaAgent shortly.
dialog.serverModuleMissing:
Server startup failed: cannot find module {module}.
This typically happens right after an auto-update, while new files are still being written to disk.
Recommendation: wait 1-2 minutes and restart HanaAgent. Report on GitHub if it persists.

updateSettings.searchNoResults: No settings matching "{query}". Try a broader keyword.
updateSettings.searchMissingQuery: The search action requires a query parameter.
updateSettings.applyMissingParams: The apply action requires both key and value parameters.
updateSettings.sandboxNetworkDesc: Allow sandboxed commands to access the public internet; Windows command sandboxing does not support network isolation and always keeps the current user's network access
updateSettings.bridgeMediaPublicBaseUrlDesc: Public HTTP/HTTPS base URL used by external platforms to fetch local staged files. Usually provided by a reverse proxy or tunnel. Leave empty to fall back to HANA_BRIDGE_PUBLIC_BASE_URL.
updateSettings.computerUseDesc: When enabled, new conversations expose the computer tool to the primary Agent. When disabled, new conversations cannot see it, and frozen old conversations are rejected if they call it.
updateSettings.experienceDesc: Enable/disable the current Agent's experience library

generateImage.description: Generate images from text descriptions. Non-blocking: returns immediately after submission, displays automatically when complete.
generateImage.countDesc: Number of concurrent generations, default 1, max 9
generateImage.resolutionDesc: Unified resolution tier: 1k, 2k, 4k; adapter maps to the closest vendor size
generateImage.qualityDesc: Quality tier: low, medium, high, auto (adapter maps to vendor parameters)
generateImage.modelDesc: Model ID or short name (e.g. 5.0, dall-e-3). Uses configured default when omitted
generateImage.suggestedFilenameDesc: Short human filename hint for generated files, without extension. Use a concise slug or title, not the full prompt.
generateImage.submitted: Submitted {count} image generation(s); results will appear in the card below when complete.

generateVideo.description: Generate videos from text descriptions. Non-blocking: returns immediately after submission, displays automatically when complete.
generateVideo.submitted: Video generation submitted; result will appear in the card below when complete.

getCoverStyleGuide.description: When the user wants to generate, replace, or optimize a cover/header image for a Markdown document, call this tool first to read Hana's cover aesthetic guidelines; then write an image prompt or select an image based on the article content.
getCoverStyleGuide.themeToneDesc: Current UI theme brightness; pass light when unsure.
getCoverStyleGuide.userGuidanceDesc: Additional style direction from the user, optional.

workflow.step3: Read the article and write an image prompt or select an image per the style guide
workflow.step5: Call beautify_create-cover to apply the image

applyCoverCandidate.description: Apply an existing image file as a Markdown cover and write it back to frontmatter.
applyCoverCandidate.targetFilePathDesc: Absolute path to the Markdown file.
applyCoverCandidate.generatedFilePathDesc: Absolute path to an existing image, which can come from image generation tools, built-in covers, or user local images.
applyCoverCandidate.targetFilePathRequired: targetFilePath must be an absolute path to a Markdown file.
applyCoverCandidate.generatedFilePathRequired: generatedFilePath must be an absolute path to an image file.
applyCoverCandidate.applied: Cover applied and written to Markdown frontmatter.

createCover.description: Apply an existing image as a Markdown Notion-like cover. To generate a new cover, first call beautify_get-cover-style-guide, then call the image generation tool to prepare the image, and finally use this tool to write it into the Markdown.
createCover.targetFilePathDesc: Absolute path to the Markdown file. Confirm with the user first if the path is uncertain.
createCover.generatedFilePathDesc: Absolute path to an existing image, which can come from image generation tools, built-in covers, or user local images.
createCover.pixelWidthDesc: Image pixel width, optional; the tool will try to read it from the image header if not provided.
createCover.pixelHeightDesc: Image pixel height, optional; the tool will try to read it from the image header if not provided.
createCover.targetFilePathRequired: An explicit absolute path to a Markdown file is required; if initiated from a regular chat, please confirm the target file path first.
createCover.mustBeMarkdown: Target file must be a .md Markdown file.
createCover.generatedFilePathRequired: An absolute path to an existing image (generatedFilePath) is required. Please call image-gen_generate-image first and wait for the task to complete, or select a built-in/local image, then pass the image filePath to this tool.
createCover.applied: Image applied as Markdown cover and written to frontmatter.

listCapabilities.description: List the aesthetic enhancement capabilities currently supported by the Beautify tool.
listCapabilities.text: Beautify currently supports the Markdown cover workflow: first read the cover style guide, then prepare an image (from image generation tools, future built-in cover library, or user local images), and finally copy the image to the attachment folder and write it into the cover frontmatter.

sandbox.blocked:
[Security] {reason}

This operation was blocked by HanaAgent's sandbox security policy. This means the command crossed a path or permission boundary. Check the current workspace, the exact path syntax, and whether the target file belongs in an allowed workspace or session path. Explain the blocked path and reason to the user; discuss changing sandbox settings only if the user explicitly decides to do that.
sandbox.noSu: su user switching is not allowed
sandbox.noChmod: Changing file permissions is not allowed
sandbox.noChown: Changing file ownership is not allowed
sandbox.noDelRecursive: Recursive file deletion (del /s) is not allowed
sandbox.noRmdirRecursive: Recursive directory deletion (rmdir /s) is not allowed
sandbox.noTakeown: Taking file ownership is not allowed
sandbox.noIcacls: Modifying file ACL permissions is not allowed
sandbox.noSchtasks: Creating scheduled tasks is not allowed
sandbox.noScService: Operating system services is not allowed
sandbox.noPsExecutionBypass: Bypassing PowerShell execution policy is not allowed
sandbox.noBcdedit: Modifying boot configuration is not allowed
sandbox.writeRestricted: [Security] File system writes are restricted to allowed workspace and session paths. Check the current workspace and path syntax before asking the user whether to change sandbox settings.
sandbox.osRequired: [sandbox] Standard mode requires OS-level sandbox, but current platform does not support it ({platform}). Please install sandbox-exec (macOS) or bubblewrap (Linux), or switch to full-access mode.

imageGen.volcengineUnsupportedFormat: Volcengine Seedream only supports png/jpeg output format, not "{format}"

beautify.coverStyleGuide:
Hana Markdown cover default aesthetic guidelines:

1. Art style: modern Anime / animated movie key visual; do not use traditional Eastern stereotypical symbols as the default style.
2. Texture: strong paper texture, print grain, fine particles, warm material feel; like a frame bound into a paper book.
3. Narrative: cinematic, story-driven, literary atmosphere; prefer real scenes, character actions, lighting, prop relationships, and environmental traces to express the theme.
4. Content: extract imagery themes after reading the article; visualize the article's temperament rather than illustrating the summary word-for-word.
5. Fantasy: starry skies, fantasy, and literary imagery may appear, but must be naturally carried by the scene with real-world weight and emotional justification.
6. Restraint: avoid cheap AI-style floating symbol accumulation; surreal elements appear only when narratively necessary.
7. Theme: light mode uses soft warm light, low contrast, clean whitespace, visible paper fiber; dark mode uses low illumination, restrained highlights, dark areas preserving material layers.
8. Output: default to landscape 3:2 from the image generation tool; if the vendor doesn't support it, a close landscape ratio is acceptable, but never stretch the image.

themeTone.dark: Dark theme: low illumination, restrained highlights, dark areas still preserving paper fiber and material layers.
themeTone.light: Light theme: soft warm light, low contrast, clean whitespace, visible paper fiber.

auth.scopeError: Current login lacks workspace access. Please re-enter the access key.
auth.title: Mobile Access to Hana
auth.deviceHelp: Enter the access key generated by the desktop app for this device. After login, an HttpOnly session cookie takes over.
auth.passwordHelp: Sign in with the local account set up on the desktop app. Plaintext HTTP on LAN will be rejected by the server; use localhost, HTTPS, or a trusted tunnel.
auth.plaintextWarning: Remote plaintext connections do not accept username/password, to avoid exposing long-lived credentials on LAN or tunnels.

update.available: A new Hana version is ready

toolAction.title: Allow Hana to perform this action
toolAction.body: The current session is in ask-first mode. This action would modify local or external state.

computerApp.title: Allow Hana to use the computer
computerApp.body: Hana wants to control this app to continue the current task.

sessionFolders.title: Allow Hana to modify folder authorization for this conversation
sessionFolders.body: Once confirmed, this folder will become an additional sandbox directory for the current conversation. It will not change the working directory or modify prompts.

auth.oauthTimeout: OAuth timed out: no browser callback received. Please check whether port 1455 is blocked by a firewall or already in use. Windows users should also verify that localhost is not resolving to IPv6.
auth.oauthConnectFailed: Cannot connect to OAuth server{detail}. Please configure the global outbound proxy in Settings > Security, or check the HTTPS_PROXY environment variable.

deferred.noPreviewText: The background task completed but did not return previewable text.
